Author: FranFkntastic
Name: MarketMafioso
Punchline: Workshop logistics, gear planning and cleanup, and inventory history.
Description: FFXIV workshop logistics, gear planning and reviewed cleanup through Squire, and optional receiver-backed inventory history. Use /mmf to open settings.
Changelog: Adds Squire Outfitter loadout planning for jobs and retainers, improves gearset freshness and cleanup-rule reliability, and streamlines the main interface.
